creator: LoN_Kamikaze@gmx.de
text:
The sysctl kern.ngroups cannot be changed, even setting it in /boot/loader.conf has no effect. The 16 groups limit is a bit low for an unchangeable magic number.

How-To-Repeat: # echo kern.ngroups=\"32\" >> /boot/loader.conf
# shutdown -r now

..

# sysctl kern.ngroups
